auth.title: Sign in to your account
auth.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send you an access code.
auth.wrong_code: Invalid or expired code. Request a new one.
auth.no_password: No password needed, just your email
auth.confirmed_desc: Go back to the BeGift app from your home screen to continue.
auth.confirmed_hint: Open the {app} icon on your phone's home screen.

cookie.title: We use technical cookies
cookie.description: Only cookies necessary for the service to work — no advertising tracking.

invite.title: Invite a friend to BeGift
invite.subtitle: Share your personal link: whoever opens a gift through your invite stays linked to you.
invite.wa_message: Hey! I'm sending you a digital gift on BeGift 🎁 You'll love it. {link}

dashboard.no_received_subtitle: Gifts you open will appear here.
dashboard.free_account: Create a free account to manage your gifts and received reactions.
dashboard.login_title: Sign in to see your gifts
dashboard.confirm_delete_received: Remove this gift from the list?

create.hint_video: Upload your own video or a video file
create.message_placeholder:
Dear {name},

I wanted to tell you…
create.thanking_hint: We've pre-filled the recipient. Add content, a message, and you're done.
create.occasion_hint: Pick a preset for the right colors, sound and starter message (or skip).
create.occasion_applied: ✓ Preset applied — you can still tweak it
create.login_title: Sign in to create a gift
create.login_desc: Create a free account to start sending unforgettable digital gifts.

gift.preview_mode_banner: Sender preview — this open won't be counted
gift.send_reaction_to_sender: Send a reaction to the sender
gift.create_free_account: Create your free account and start sending unforgettable digital gifts.
gift.thank_with_gift_desc: Open the creator with the recipient already filled in — ten seconds and it's sent.

reaction_builder.sent_desc: Your message has been delivered to the sender.
reaction_builder.text_placeholder: Thank you so much! I was speechless when I opened the gift…
reaction_builder.gift_desc: You'll create a new gift to send back.
reaction_builder.respond_desc: Choose how you want to react.

reactions.title: Received reactions 💌
reactions.none_subtitle: When someone responds to your gift, the reaction will appear here.

login_prompt.title: Create your account
login_prompt.description: Sign in to manage your gifts, see who opened them and reactions received.

share.share_title: A gift for you on BeGift
share.whatsapp_text:
I have a gift for you! 🎁
{url}
share.whatsapp_notify:
Hey {name}! I have a gift for you on BeGift 🎁
Open it here: {url}

app.name: BeGift
app.tagline: Digital gifts that feel like magic

home.hero_subtitle: A message, a song, two concert tickets — wrap them in a digital package that opens with magic. For a special occasion, or just to say {q}.
home.install_banner_subtitle: Add it to your home screen
home.feature1_desc: Paper, ribbon, bow, animation and sound.
home.feature2_desc: From click to link in less than a minute.
home.feature3_desc: No app needed for the recipient.
home.step1_desc: A photo, a video, a song, a letter. Even a PDF or a link to a card. It's up to you.
home.step2_desc: Colors, ribbon, bow, opening animation and sound. Use a template if you're in a hurry.
home.step3_desc: Share it however you like — WhatsApp, iMessage, Telegram, email. They open it, get emotional, reply.
home.examples_subtitle: Pick a template and you're halfway there.
home.social_proof_title: Built for people who really care
home.social_proof_desc: BeGift exists to make a moment special — not to impress. No ads, no trackers, no spam. Just your gift and the joy of whoever opens it.
home.final_cta_desc: The first gift is free. Just 60 seconds.

ai_helper.intro: We'll generate 3 message suggestions for {name}. Pick the tone and — optionally — give us some context.
ai_helper.done_intro: 3 proposals generated for {name}. Tap the one you prefer — you can edit it after.
ai_helper.context_label: Context or what the gift contains
ai_helper.context_placeholder: E.g. vacation photos, song that reminds us of our first date, etc.
ai_helper.err_not_authenticated: Sign in to use the AI assistant.
ai_helper.err_rate_limited: Too many requests — try again in a few minutes.
ai_helper.err_ai_unavailable: The AI assistant is temporarily offline. Try again soon.
ai_helper.err_parse_failed: The proposals didn't arrive in the correct format, please retry.

push_card.title: Turn on notifications
push_card.desc: Get notified when someone sends you a gift, even when the app is closed — just like WhatsApp.
push_card.err_denied: Permission denied. You can enable it in your browser settings.
push_card.err_save_failed: Save failed. Please try again later.

ios_install.title: Install BeGift on your Home Screen
ios_install.desc: Tap {icon} at the bottom of your browser, then {addCta} to have BeGift like an app and receive notifications when a gift arrives.

username_onboarding.title: Choose your username
username_onboarding.desc_before_code: This is how others will identify you on BeGift. Only lowercase letters, numbers and
username_onboarding.err_taken: This name was just taken. Try another.
username_onboarding.change_later: You can change it anytime from your profile settings.
username_onboarding.val_reserved: This name is reserved, pick another

settings_profile.title: Your profile
settings_profile.desc_before_code: Your username is how others identify you on BeGift. Only lowercase letters, numbers and
settings_profile.err_taken: This name was taken. Try another.
settings_profile.change_warning_before: ⚠️ If you change your username, people who knew you as
settings_profile.change_warning_after: won't find you with that name anymore.
